rationale: For an Indonesian local business tool (RT/RW Net), the design must evoke trust, financial clarity, and approachability. Ditching the typical tech-dark-mode for a warm, off-white and forest green palette makes it feel grounded, premium, and distinct.

surfaces.sidebar: bg-white border-r border-gray-200 w-64 flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300
surfaces.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-200 h-16 flex items-center px-8
surfaces.card: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

components.button: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-background
components.badge_lunas: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
components.badge_belum: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
components.table_header: text-xs text-gray-700 uppercase bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200
components.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#166534] focus:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

login_background.description: Green abstract minimal texture for the right side of the login screen

pages_instructions.login: Split screen layout. Left: Operator selection (use avatar images), PIN input (101), Login button. Right: Full height image (login_background) with a glassmorphism overlay containing a tagline 'Sistem Manajemen Terpadu RT/RW Net'.
pages_instructions.dashboard: Use 'Control Room Grid' (grid-cols-4). Top row: 4 Stat cards (Total Pelanggan, Total Bayar, Sudah Bayar, Belum Bayar). Middle: Recent activity feed spanning col-span-2 or 3, Quick actions in remaining space. No shadows, 1px borders.
pages_instructions.data_psb: Full width CRUD table. Put Search bar and 'Tambah Pelanggan' CTA aligned top-right. Add 'Hapus Semua' as a subtle but accessible secondary button (needs password prompt modal). Column headers should be uppercase, tracking-wider.
pages_instructions.verifikasi_pembayaran: Toolbar at top with Month/Year dropdown and primary 'Generate' button. Below, the payments table with LUNAS/BELUM badges. Edit/Delete icons at the end of rows.
pages_instructions.statistik: 4 Chart widgets using Recharts. Use primary green for main data bars, and muted amber for secondary/warning data. Maintain ample padding (p-6) inside chart cards.
pages_instructions.monitoring: Empty state by default until user clicks the massive primary 'CEK PELANGGAN BELUM BAYAR' button. Once clicked, display an overdue list grouped by 'Pemilik' (Owner).

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='operator-select-jamil'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast on buttons and badges meets APCA standards. Do not rely solely on color for LUNAS/BELUM (include text and icons).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: 'Outfit' (Headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (Body) from Google Fonts.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons.
Build the dashboard layout with a collapsible sidebar and sticky glassmorphism header.
Use Shadcn UI components but override the default rounding (use rounded-md) and remove drop-shadows (use flat 1px borders).
Replace all standard blue/indigo defaults with the Primary Green (#166534).
Use the provided media URLs for operator avatars on the login page to add a premium touch.
Ensure all user-facing labels and data are in Indonesian as requested.
